titles.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
titles.desc: A legendary concierge and his lobby boy get tangled in a caper over a priceless painting, told in Wes Anderson's candy-box style.

titles.title: Game Night
titles.desc: A couples' game night spirals into a real kidnapping plot nobody believes is real — sharp, twisty, and genuinely funny.

titles.title: Palm Springs
titles.desc: Two wedding guests stuck in a time loop together — the perfect mix of silly and surprisingly sweet.

titles.title: The Nice Guys
titles.desc: A bumbling PI and a hired enforcer team up in 1970s LA — a buddy comedy with real bite.

titles.title: Paddington 2
titles.desc: The politest bear in cinema goes to prison and makes it wholesome. Pure serotonin for any couple.

titles.title: Chef
titles.desc: A burnt-out chef rediscovers his joy with a food truck and his son. Do not watch hungry.

titles.title: Crazy Rich Asians
titles.desc: Meeting the in-laws, except the in-laws are Singapore's most extravagant dynasty.

titles.title: About Time
titles.desc: A man who can travel through time learns the ordinary days are the ones worth reliving. A guaranteed happy cry.

titles.title: La La Land
titles.desc: An aspiring actress and a jazz pianist chase their dreams — and each other — through a dreamlike Los Angeles.

titles.title: The Princess Bride
titles.desc: Fencing, fighting, torture, revenge, giants, true love — the fairy tale that never gets old.

titles.title: Groundhog Day
titles.desc: A cynical weatherman relives the same day until he gets it right. The comfort-watch time loop original.

titles.title: Hot Fuzz
titles.desc: A London supercop gets reassigned to a sleepy village where nothing is what it seems. Endlessly rewatchable.

titles.title: Knives Out
titles.desc: A master detective untangles a wealthy family's secrets after a suspicious death. A whodunit you'll solve together.

titles.title: Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery
titles.desc: Benoit Blanc crashes a billionaire's private-island murder mystery party — and finds a real one.

titles.title: Gone Girl
titles.desc: A wife vanishes and her husband becomes the prime suspect. The ultimate 'discuss afterwards' couple thriller.

titles.title: Prisoners
titles.desc: A father takes the search for his missing daughter into his own hands. Bleak, gripping, masterful.

titles.title: No Country for Old Men
titles.desc: A hunter stumbles on drug money and an unstoppable killer follows. The Coens' modern western masterpiece.

titles.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
titles.desc: One long, glorious chase across the wasteland. Two hours of pure adrenaline you can both yell at.

titles.title: Top Gun: Maverick
titles.desc: Maverick returns to train a new generation for an impossible mission. Crowd-pleasing from first frame to last.

titles.title: The Departed
titles.desc: A cop inside the mob, a mobster inside the police — Scorsese's cat-and-mouse classic.

titles.title: Parasite
titles.desc: A poor family cons its way into a rich household — then the floor drops out. Best Picture for a reason.

titles.title: Get Out
titles.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's parents has never been this terrifying. Smart horror you'll dissect for days.

titles.title: A Quiet Place
titles.desc: A family survives in silence among creatures that hunt by sound. Ninety minutes of held breath.

titles.title: Hereditary
titles.desc: A family unravels after a death reveals something darker in their bloodline. Not for the faint of heart.

titles.title: The Silence of the Lambs
titles.desc: A young FBI trainee must charm one monster to catch another. Still the gold standard of psychological thrillers.

titles.title: The Notebook
titles.desc: A summer romance tested by class, war, and time. Bring tissues — both of you.

titles.title: Pride & Prejudice
titles.desc: Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy spar their way into history's most satisfying slow burn.

titles.title: Her
titles.desc: A lonely writer falls in love with an AI. Tender, strange, and more relevant every year.

titles.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
titles.desc: A couple erases each other from their memories — and discovers what's worth keeping. A love story in reverse.

titles.title: Up
titles.desc: A widower ties balloons to his house and floats toward an old promise. The first ten minutes alone are legend.

titles.title: Coco
titles.desc: A boy journeys into the Land of the Dead to uncover his family's musical secret. Gorgeous and guaranteed tears.

titles.title: Inside Out
titles.desc: Joy, Sadness, and the rest of an 11-year-old's emotions navigate a family move. Smarter than most dramas.

titles.title: Marriage Story
titles.desc: A marriage comes apart with love still in it. Devastating, honest, and brilliantly acted.

titles.title: Past Lives
titles.desc: Childhood sweethearts reunite decades later across two continents and ask 'what if'. Quietly shattering.

titles.title: CODA
titles.desc: The only hearing member of a deaf family discovers her voice. The feel-good Best Picture winner.

titles.title: Little Women
titles.desc: The March sisters grow up, fall in love, and chase their ambitions in Greta Gerwig's warm retelling.

titles.title: Inception
titles.desc: A thief who steals secrets from dreams takes one last job: planting an idea. You'll argue about the ending.

titles.title: Interstellar
titles.desc: A father crosses galaxies to save humanity — and get back to his daughter. Space epic with a beating heart.

titles.title: Arrival
titles.desc: A linguist races to decode an alien language before the world panics. Cerebral sci-fi with an emotional gut punch.

titles.title: The Prestige
titles.desc: Two rival magicians destroy themselves chasing the perfect trick. Watch closely.

titles.title: Shutter Island
titles.desc: A U.S. Marshal investigates a disappearance at an asylum for the criminally insane. Nothing is as it seems.

titles.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
titles.desc: A laundromat owner must channel every version of herself across the multiverse to save her family. Unclassifiable and unforgettable.

titles.title: Oppenheimer
titles.desc: The father of the atomic bomb reckons with what he built. Three hours that fly by.

titles.title: The Social Network
titles.desc: The founding of Facebook as a betrayal-laced courtroom drama, written at Sorkin speed.

titles.title: Dune: Part Two
titles.desc: Paul Atreides rises among the Fremen to wage war for Arrakis. Spectacle on the grandest possible scale.

titles.title: Blade Runner 2049
titles.desc: A new blade runner unearths a secret that could break society. Stunning, slow-burn sci-fi noir.

titles.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
titles.desc: Miles Morales meets every other Spider-Person in an animated style that changed the industry.

titles.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
titles.desc: Miles is flung across the multiverse and up against every Spider-society rule. Somehow even better than the first.

titles.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
titles.desc: A gang of lovable space misfits accidentally becomes the galaxy's best hope. Great soundtrack included.

titles.title: Jurassic Park
titles.desc: Dinosaurs are brought back to life and immediately demonstrate why that's a problem. Timeless blockbuster magic.

titles.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
titles.desc: Nine companions set out to destroy the One Ring. The all-night fantasy journey begins here.

titles.title: Howl's Moving Castle
titles.desc: A cursed young woman finds refuge in a wizard's walking castle. Miyazaki at his most romantic.

titles.title: Spirited Away
titles.desc: A girl must work in a bathhouse for spirits to free her parents. One of the greatest animated films ever made.

titles.title: Anora
titles.desc: A Brooklyn dancer impulsively marries a Russian oligarch's son — then his family finds out. Riotous, then heartbreaking.

titles.title: Conclave
titles.desc: Cardinals gather in secrecy to elect a new pope, and the politicking turns lethal-sharp. A thriller made of whispers.

titles.title: Challengers
titles.desc: A tennis love triangle plays out across a decade and one electric championship match.

titles.title: A Real Pain
titles.desc: Mismatched cousins tour Poland to honor their grandmother. Funny and sad in the same breath, and mercifully short.

titles.title: Wicked
titles.desc: The untold story of the witches of Oz, with showstoppers big enough to defy gravity.

titles.title: Sinners
titles.desc: Twin brothers return to the Jim Crow South to open a juke joint and find an evil waiting for them. Bold, bloody, and original.

titles.title: F1: The Movie
titles.desc: A veteran driver returns to Formula 1 to mentor a rookie and chase one last shot. Race scenes that pin you to the couch.

titles.title: Superman
titles.desc: James Gunn reboots the Man of Steel with heart, humor, and a scene-stealing superdog.

titles.title: Weapons
titles.desc: Every child from one classroom vanishes at exactly 2:17 a.m. — except one. An unnerving mystery-box horror.

titles.title: One Battle After Another
titles.desc: A washed-up ex-revolutionary races to save his daughter from an old enemy. Paul Thomas Anderson's wildest ride.

titles.title: Casablanca
titles.desc: Of all the gin joints in all the world. The classic that defines 'they don't make them like this anymore'.

titles.title: When Harry Met Sally
titles.desc: Can men and women ever just be friends? The rom-com blueprint, still unbeaten.

titles.title: Back to the Future
titles.desc: Marty McFly accidentally drives a DeLorean into 1955 and nearly erases himself. Perfect from start to finish.

titles.title: The Truman Show
titles.desc: A man slowly realizes his entire life is a television show. Funny, eerie, and quietly profound.

titles.title: Amélie
titles.desc: A shy Parisian waitress secretly engineers joy in strangers' lives. Whimsy perfected.

titles.title: Oldboy
titles.desc: A man imprisoned for 15 years without explanation gets five days to find out why. Brutal and unforgettable.

titles.title: The Office (US)
titles.desc: Paper company mockumentary with the most rewatchable cast on television. The eternal default for a reason.

titles.title: Parks and Recreation
titles.desc: Leslie Knope wills a small town's parks department to greatness. Relentlessly optimistic comfort comedy.

titles.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
titles.desc: A precinct of detective goofballs solves crimes between bits. Noice. Smort. Perfect episode-or-two material.

titles.title: Ted Lasso
titles.desc: An American football coach takes over an English soccer club armed only with relentless kindness. Believe.

titles.title: Schitt's Creek
titles.desc: A bankrupt rich family rebuilds in a small town they once bought as a joke. Starts funny, ends beloved.

titles.title: What We Do in the Shadows
titles.desc: Vampire roommates on Staten Island bicker about chores and world domination. Absurdly quotable.

titles.title: Abbott Elementary
titles.desc: Underfunded Philly teachers do their best on camera. The warmest network comedy in years.

titles.title: Only Murders in the Building
titles.desc: Three true-crime-obsessed neighbors podcast their way through a murder in their own building. A perfect couples' mystery.

titles.title: The Good Place
titles.desc: A woman wakes up in the afterlife by clerical error. A sitcom that smuggles in a philosophy degree.

titles.title: New Girl
titles.desc: Jess moves in with three single guys after a breakup. Loft chaos, True American, and slow-burn romance.

titles.title: Friends
titles.desc: Six friends, one coffee shop, ten seasons of comfort. The one you put on when you can't pick anything.

titles.title: Gilmore Girls
titles.desc: A fast-talking mother-daughter duo in the coziest small town on television. Autumn in show form.

titles.title: Breaking Bad
titles.desc: A chemistry teacher with cancer becomes a drug kingpin. Television's most complete transformation.

titles.title: Better Call Saul
titles.desc: How a charming con-man lawyer became Saul Goodman. A slow burn that pays off everything.

titles.title: Stranger Things
titles.desc: Kids on bikes versus a monster from another dimension, soaked in 80s nostalgia. Binge fuel.

titles.title: Dark
titles.desc: A missing child unravels four families across multiple timelines in a German town. Demands and rewards full attention.

titles.title: Money Heist
titles.desc: A mastermind called the Professor orchestrates the most audacious heist in history. Impossible to watch just one.

titles.title: Severance
titles.desc: Office workers surgically split their work and home memories — then start asking why. Eerie, gorgeous, addictive.

titles.title: The Last of Us
titles.desc: A smuggler escorts a girl who may be humanity's cure across a ruined America. Brutal world, enormous heart.

titles.title: True Detective
titles.desc: Two detectives chase a ritual killer across seventeen years of Louisiana rot. Season one is a masterpiece.

titles.title: Mindhunter
titles.desc: FBI agents interview serial killers to invent criminal profiling. Chilling without showing a drop of blood.

titles.title: Slow Horses
titles.desc: MI5's rejects, led by the magnificently disgusting Jackson Lamb, keep stumbling into real conspiracies.

titles.title: The Night Agent
titles.desc: A low-level FBI agent answers a phone that's never supposed to ring. Pure popcorn conspiracy thriller.

titles.title: Fallout
titles.desc: A vault dweller surfaces into the gleefully savage post-nuclear wasteland. Violent, funny, and stylish.

titles.title: Fleabag
titles.desc: A woman narrates her chaotic London life straight to camera. Twelve episodes, two perfect seasons, one Hot Priest.

titles.title: Normal People
titles.desc: Marianne and Connell orbit each other from school through university. Intimate, raw, and devastating.

titles.title: One Day
titles.desc: Emma and Dexter, one day a year, for twenty years. Short episodes that sneak up on you completely.

titles.title: This Is Us
titles.desc: The Pearson family across three timelines. Engineered to make you cry weekly, and it works.

titles.title: After Life
titles.desc: A widower decides to say whatever he wants to whoever he wants. Bleakly funny, then unexpectedly tender.

titles.title: Black Mirror
titles.desc: Standalone nightmares about technology and human nature. Each episode is its own debate starter.

titles.title: Chernobyl
titles.desc: The 1986 nuclear disaster, hour by hour, lie by lie. Five episodes of staggering television.

titles.title: Succession
titles.desc: A media dynasty's children knife-fight for the throne in boardrooms and group chats. Shakespearean and savage.

titles.title: The Crown
titles.desc: Queen Elizabeth II's reign, decade by lavish decade. Prestige drama you can sink into for weeks.

titles.title: 3 Body Problem
titles.desc: Scientists die mysteriously as humanity receives its first message from the stars. Big-idea sci-fi to argue about.

titles.title: Game of Thrones
titles.desc: Noble houses scheme and slaughter for the Iron Throne. The biggest shared-watch event ever made.

titles.title: House of the Dragon
titles.desc: The Targaryens tear themselves apart two centuries before Daenerys. Dragons, betrayal, repeat.

titles.title: The Mandalorian
titles.desc: A lone bounty hunter protects the galaxy's most adorable asset. Star Wars as a weekly western.

titles.title: Arcane
titles.desc: Two sisters end up on opposite sides of a city tearing itself apart. The most beautiful animation on TV.

titles.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
titles.desc: A young avatar must master the elements and end a hundred-year war. A perfect story at any age.

titles.title: Shōgun
titles.desc: An English pilot shipwrecks into the lethal politics of feudal Japan. Sweeping, meticulous, magnificent.

titles.title: The Witcher
titles.desc: A mutant monster hunter's destiny tangles with a sorceress and a princess. Toss a coin.

titles.title: Bridgerton
titles.desc: Regency London's marriage market, narrated by a mysterious gossip. Lavish, steamy comfort viewing.

titles.title: Nobody Wants This
titles.desc: An agnostic podcaster falls for a rabbi. A grown-up rom-com that's actually romantic and actually funny.

titles.title: Heartstopper
titles.desc: Two British schoolboys fall for each other in the gentlest show on television. Animated leaves included.

titles.title: The Great British Bake Off
titles.desc: Kind amateurs bake in a tent while being lovely to each other. The lowest-stakes, highest-comfort show ever.

titles.title: Queer Eye
titles.desc: The Fab Five rebuild someone's confidence, wardrobe, and kitchen in every episode. Guaranteed happy tears.

titles.title: The Penguin
titles.desc: Oz Cobb claws his way up Gotham's underworld after the flood. A mob epic that happens to be a Batman show.

titles.title: The Day of the Jackal
titles.desc: An elite assassin and a dogged intelligence officer play continental cat-and-mouse. Slick, propulsive spy craft.

titles.title: Adolescence
titles.desc: A 13-year-old is arrested for murder, each episode in one unbroken shot. Four hours you won't shake off.

titles.title: The Pitt
titles.desc: One brutal 15-hour ER shift, told hour by hour in real time. The best medical drama in decades.

titles.title: The Studio
titles.desc: A newly minted studio head tries to keep movies alive while Hollywood eats itself. Cameo-stuffed cringe comedy.

titles.title: Paradise
titles.desc: A Secret Service agent investigates a murder inside a sealed utopian community. Twists you won't see coming.

titles.title: One Piece
titles.desc: A rubber-limbed dreamer assembles a pirate crew to find the ultimate treasure. Joyful live-action adventure.

titles.title: Modern Family
titles.desc: Three branches of one sprawling family, eleven seasons of reliable laughs. Easy to drop in anywhere.

titles.title: The Embroidered Truth
titles.desc: After embroidery house owner Wu Lian ruins countless lives of the female embroiderers in his climb to power, Lin Rulan, one of the embroiderers, survives a tragic betrayal while…

titles.desc: In the early years of the Republic of China era, a bizarre murder case known as "Water Ghost Longing for Home" occurs at sea in Nanyang. Zhang Haiyan and Zhang Haixia, two staff…

titles.title: The Evil Lawyer
titles.desc: When a principled young lawyer becomes the prime accused in the murder of a high-ranking police officer's son, he is forced to team up with the "Evil Lawyer," exploiting every…

titles.title: Accident Squad
titles.desc: A series of bizarre deaths disguised as accidental incidents shocks the city, prompting the Public Security Bureau to establish a specialized Accident Investigation Unit. Led by…

titles.title: Viral Hit
titles.desc: When he accidentally goes viral after a brawl, a weak and broke teen realizes livestreaming fights against delinquents could change his life.

titles.title: Surviving Earth

titles.title: Every Year After
titles.desc: Carley Fortune's Every Year After is a romantic, nostalgic story of first loves and the people and choices that mark us forever.

titles.title: Outlast: The Jungle
titles.desc: On a remote tropical island, 16 players must survive the elements, outmaneuver rivals and remain part of a team for a chance to win a $1 million prize.

titles.title: Above Myriads
titles.desc: After transmigrating to the Xianjiang Continent, Yi Feng discovers that he was born without a spiritual root, making cultivation impossible. With no choice but to rely on the…

titles.title: Big Girls Wanted: Escaping Pearadise
titles.desc: Pearadise promised safety and a utopia for plus‑size women. The sisterhood turns dark as allegations of assault and coercion spread among the women.

titles.title: Most Extreme Humans
titles.desc: Most Extreme Humans follows people from around the globe living with the world's rarest and most remarkable physical conditions. From a Filipino man whose hands have grown so…

titles.title: Rolf Harris: Primetime Predator
titles.desc: A national treasure. A shocking trial. Rolf Harris: Primetime Predator exposes for the first time how celebrity, nostalgia and unchecked power shielded decades of abuse.

titles.title: The First Jasmine
titles.desc: Ye Li, the eldest daughter of the Ye family, is married into the dilapidated Prince Ding's manor to wed the wheelchair-bound Prince Mo Xiuyao. On the very same day, Prince Li, Mo…

titles.title: Secret Diary
titles.desc: This drama follows Yin Zixi, a strong-willed and successful career woman who rediscovers a diary she lost many years ago, triggering memories that had been buried for over a…

titles.title: Norges vei tilbake
titles.desc: After 26 years of tournament drought, Norway's 2026 World Cup hopes were next to nil. But what followed rekindled belief, as told in this documentary.

titles.title: Rise Again
titles.desc: After three hundred years of waiting, Immortal King Su Wubing and Holy Maiden Lin Ningxue held their celestial wedding, only to be stopped by the Heavenly Dao. To protect Wubing,…

titles.title: Hamza Loves Animals: Africa
titles.desc: Join Ranger Hamza on an epic African adventure! Visiting animal sanctuaries and exploring the wild, he discovers incredible animals, each with their very own story to tell.

titles.title: Ground Up
titles.desc: Set in Tasmania, the series follows AFL administrator Hugh Shen, dispatched from Melbourne to establish the island's first-ever AFL team. But there's a catch: the locals must…

titles.title: Tiger Island
titles.desc: In Nepal, a team of film-makers and big cat experts begin an expedition following two tiger mothers and their cubs, on an extraordinary island full of potential dangers.

titles.title: 33 días
titles.desc: The escape of two dangerous criminals from the Lleida Penitentiary Center in 2001 triggered a 33-day police manhunt, marked by violence, sacrifices and loyalty.

titles.title: Wonder Wall
titles.desc: A terribly unlucky young couple stumbles into a massive villa by chance and accidentally discovers a huge sum of hidden fortune. But when trouble hits, they can no longer tell —…

titles.title: The Vanishing of Debbie Griggs
titles.desc: Chronicles the investigation into the 1999 disappearance of 34-year-old Debbie Griggs, a pregnant mother of three who vanished from her home in Deal, Kent - a case spanning more…

titles.desc: It is the biggest home cook competition of all time. Actor, television host and former pro football player Terry Crews hosts as 100 of America's elite home cooks enter the stadium…
